# TypeScript Gotchas

> Known TypeScript patterns that bypass type safety or produce unexpected runtime behavior. Load all HIGH entries before writing any TypeScript.

## Entries

- [Type assertions with as](type-assertions.md): as bypasses the type checker entirely -- TypeScript trusts you unconditionally. Use type guards, satisfies, or instanceof instead for safe narrowing. HIGH.
- [Optional chaining vs nullish coalescing](nullish.md): ?. returns undefined on a missing property (does not throw). ?? only catches null and undefined -- it does NOT catch 0, empty string, or false. MEDIUM.
- [Pin Drizzle ORM to ^0.45.x](drizzle-version-pinning.md): v1.0.0-beta has breaking migration folder structure changes. Stay on 0.45.x until a deliberate upgrade window. HIGH.
- [Vitest jsdom requires separate install](vitest-jsdom.md): environment: "jsdom" in vitest.config.ts fails unless jsdom is installed as a devDependency. MEDIUM.
- [Vite $lib alias needs vite.config.ts](vite-lib-alias.md): Path alias in tsconfig.json only is not enough -- Vite/Rollup needs it in vite.config.ts resolve.alias too. MEDIUM.
- [Biome 2.x config format changed](biome-config-migration.md): organizeImports, files.ignore, and folder patterns all changed. Run npx biome migrate --write. MEDIUM.
- [Cascading import breakage on module deletion](cascading-import-breakage.md): Deleting modules causes chain-reaction build failures far beyond the listed files. Trace full import graph before deleting. HIGH.
- [SQL parameter index off-by-one in dynamic UPDATE builders](sql-parameter-index-off-by-one.md): Dynamic SET clause with appended fields shifts WHERE clause indices. Query executes without error but matches zero rows. Silent data loss. HIGH.
- [Date-only strings parse as UTC, off-by-one in local timezone](date-only-utc-off-by-one.md): new Date("2026-01-15") is UTC midnight; Intl.DateTimeFormat shows previous day in US timezones. MEDIUM.
- [Async singleton race condition](async-singleton-race.md): Guarding async singleton with null check on resolved value lets concurrent callers create duplicate instances. Store the promise, not the value. HIGH.
- [TypeScript 6 peer dep conflict with typescript-eslint](ts6-peer-dep-conflict.md): typescript-eslint 8.x requires typescript <6.0.0. Upgrading to TS 6 breaks npm ci in Docker/CI. Add legacy-peer-deps=true to .npmrc as a bridge. HIGH.
